description: Configure a high-contrast 'White Mode' chart for SPY (Daily) for professional publication. The chart must feature a white background, black axis labels, and hidden or transparent grid lines. Include a 50-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator styled in dark blue. Save this configuration as a chart template named 'PrintReady' and export the resulting chart as a PNG file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\SPY_Report.png.
